## Summary

Describe the change and the motivation behind it.

## Testing

List the commands you ran and the results.

## Checklist

- [ ] I linked the related issue when one exists
- [ ] I ran `./vendor/bin/pint --test`
- [ ] I ran `php artisan test`
- [ ] I ran `npm run build` for frontend-affecting changes
- [ ] I updated documentation, screenshots, or notes when needed
- [ ] I called out migrations, config changes, or breaking changes when applicable
